text: As the video closes and I turn towards this vibrant wall, I am struck by a sense of transition. The end of one experience blends seamlessly with the beginning of reflection. In this room of ideas and observations, I feel both curious and slightly detached, as if moving from the concrete reality of a meeting into the abstract embrace of thought and innovation. There is a gentle excitement in lingering with questions left open, but also a touch of solitude as I stand here, an observer on the threshold between connection and contemplation.
